title: Faithful Backrooms
description: Adding and integrating the vast expanse of the Backrooms into Minecraft.
body:
Adding and integrating the vast expanse of the Backrooms into Minecraft.

Explore, survive and learn to thrive in the Backrooms! This mod looks to offer the most fun survival and exploration experience for people who love the Backrooms. Full with liminal spaces, items, mysterious mechanics, and much more.

For more info, visit the official (but WIP) [Wiki!](https://a-faithful-guide-to-the-backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/A_Faithful_Guide_to_the_Backrooms_Wiki)!
